title: Global AI Confluence 2026 Unites Students for a Tech-Powered Future
description: Over 180 international students from 26 countries participated in India's 'Global Artificial Intelligence Confluence 2026.' The event focused on AI's socio-economic impact, ethical values, and global innovation. Experts emphasized creating indigenous AI models and discussed concerns like data privacy and misinformation. The conference concluded at Guru Gorakshnath Research Centre auditorium.
content: Over 180 international students from 26 countries gathered in India for the 'Global Artificial Intelligence Confluence 2026,' aiming to explore AI's innovation and socio-economic influence. The two-day event began on Friday, organized by the universi... [759 chars]

title: Salesforce pushes 'agentic enterprise' shift as Philippine firms face AI transition
description: ENTERPRISE software company Salesforce on Thursday urged Philippine businesses to embed artificial intelligence into core operations as shifting customer expectations and workforce dynamics accelerate demand for what it calls “agentic enterprises.”

title: Wikipedia officially bans AI-generated encyclopedia entries
description: The internet’s favorite encyclopedia has officially banned its 260,000 human editors from using artificial intelligence to write articles — a major crackdown as so-called “AI slop” floods the web.
content:
Bots, be gone.
The internet’s favorite encyclopedia has officially banned its 260,000 human editors from using artificial intelligence to write articles — a major crackdown as so-called “AI slop” floods the web.

title: Artificial Intelligence: Revolutionizing Every Aspect of Life - High Court Shields Gautam Gambhir's Image Against AI Exploitation
description: Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly redefining the way we live, work, and interact. No longer confined to the realm of science fiction, AI is now a driving force behind innovations across all sectors— from healthcare and finance to entertainment and manufacturing. Its impact is far-reaching, transforming industries, reshaping economies, and influencing the way we navigate daily life.

title: Artificial intelligence can’t deliver justice; tech must remain enabler in courts: Judges
description: 'Technology should not ultimately make justice a casualty,' says Justice Augustine George Masih of the Supreme Court.

title: College students are writing with AI, but a pilot study finds they're not simply letting it write for them
description: Debates about generative AI in higher education have been informed by studies of completed student papers, or self-reported survey data. Research shows that artificial intelligence tools can support learning, but has also raised concerns, including students' overreliance, cheating, and the potential degradation of critical thinking and engagement.
